subject: Zenodo 11243763 — [82Rb]Cl human cardiac, Biograph Vision Quadra

matched_vessel_control.interpretation: no detectable O2 effect of the RV/LV magnitude

chamber_identity.method: tau-free: histoimage reproduction + joint multi-organ panel

instrument_82rb.envelope_note: systematic bound (order-of-magnitude), not a calibrated gradient; direction unstable across cores

verdict: Reproducible, registration-stable, blood-borne, chamber-identity-confirmed RV>LV o-Ps lifetime pattern (~1.5sigma), NOT attributable to oxygenation: matched-vessel control null and effect falls within the isotope-matched 82Rb instrumental positional envelope. Not a clean in-vivo oxygenation biomarker on this single subject.
